scripts.dev: cp node_modules/tsx/node_modules/@esbuild/linux-x64/bin/esbuild /tmp/esbuild-tsx 2>/dev/null; chmod +x /tmp/esbuild-tsx 2>/dev/null; ESBUILD_BINARY_PATH=/tmp/esbuild-tsx node node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs server.ts
scripts.build: cp node_modules/@esbuild/linux-x64/bin/esbuild /tmp/esbuild-main 2>/dev/null; chmod +x /tmp/esbuild-main 2>/dev/null; ESBUILD_BINARY_PATH=/tmp/esbuild-main node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && ESBUILD_BINARY_PATH=/tmp/esbuild-main esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.test: cp node_modules/@esbuild/linux-x64/bin/esbuild /tmp/esbuild-main 2>/dev/null; chmod +x /tmp/esbuild-main 2>/dev/null; ESBUILD_BINARY_PATH=/tmp/esbuild-main node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run
